title: Bi-RAR: Bidirectional Retrieval-Augmented Reasoning with Information Distance

defines.name: Bi-RAR
defines.definition: A retrieval-augmented reasoning framework that evaluates each intermediate reasoning step in both forward and backward directions using bidirectional information distance and optimizes it with multi-objective reinforcement learning.

problem: Existing retrieval-augmented reasoning methods rely on outcome-based supervision that gives no explicit guidance for intermediate steps, leading to inefficient reasoning and reward hacking.
